driverSignals.name: Penetration quality
driverSignals.evidence: Partial workbook: brand penetration change -0.6pts; brand penetration 7.0% versus savory 99.2%.

driverSignals.evidence: Partial workbook does not include media reach or continuity; treat reach as a required follow-up lens, not a measured fact.

driverSignals.name: Available & Visible
driverSignals.evidence: Partial workbook does not include distribution depth, visibility, or TDP; availability remains a source gap.

driverSignals.name: Price/value delivery
driverSignals.evidence: Partial workbook: value share 0.5%, change 0.0ppts; PEP value growth -2.5%, volume -4.4%, price/volume 2.0%.

driverSignals.evidence: Overall brand value growth trails category and penetration is down.

driverSignals.name: Reach continuity
driverSignals.evidence: Monthly paid reach is healthy, but active weeks per year are weak.

driverSignals.evidence: TDP pressure appears in key channels including MULOC+ and Walmart.

driverSignals.name: Price/value delivery
driverSignals.evidence: Price positioning versus On The Border and active mix require RGM review.
